---
title: "Claire Timm"  
toc: false
about: 
  template: jolla
  image: media/photo.jpg  
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 17em
  links:
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/clairetimm
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:clairetimm@ucsb.edu
---

# Hello, welcome to my website!

I'm Claire, a third year Environmental Studies student at the University of California, Santa Barbara. I made this website to broadcast my coding skills in a statistics class. Thanks for visiting, I hope you enjoy! :)
